---
title: Un pug
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784549264/pug_cvvtu4.jpg
description: Pug au crayon de couleur
categories: ["generalillustration"]
date: 2026-01-16
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784549264/pug_cvvtu4.jpg)
